General.Name: Torque Metals Ltd
General.Description: Torque Metals Limited engages in exploration and evaluation of minerals properties in Australia. It explores for gold, lithium, nickel, and cobalt deposits. Its flagship project is the 100% owned Paris Gold project that covers an area of approximately 1,200 square kilometers located on the Boulder-Lefroy Fault in Western Australia. Torque Metals Limited was incorporated in 2017 and is based in Perth, Australia.
